title: Crop Cultivation Science
description: The course of Crop Cultivation Science consists of 10 chapters, mainly includes "Introduction" and nine "Field crops" : wheat, rice, maize, potato, cotton, rape, soybean, millet and sorghum, including a wide variety of crops.  （Course Team）

instructors.name: Xiaolong REN;Xiaoli CHEN;Rui WANG;Peng ZHANG;Tie CAI
